title: Add CLAUDE.md Critical Rule for `make css` no-op fallback to direct CSS append

steps.description: Add a new bullet to CLAUDE.md's '## Critical Rules' section documenting the `make css` no-op / Tailwind CLI fallback (append CSS directly to dashboard/static/styles.css). Reference I-00067 as the source incident. Match the surrounding **MUST** / **NEVER** / **CRITICAL** bullet style.

Review S01: bullet placement (within '## Critical Rules' section, not elsewhere), wording matches AC1 (names symptom + action) and AC2 (references I-00067), AC3 holds (no other CLAUDE.md sections touched, no reformatting of unrelated bullets), AC4 holds (style consistency with surrounding bullets).

Final cross-step review of CR-00031. Confirm the design's four acceptance criteria are all satisfied, the diff against main is bounded to the single bullet addition, and the wording does not contradict any other rule already in CLAUDE.md.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
